_carePlans: careplans are excluded because their information is largely redundant with medications + procedures

procedures.description: Cytopathology procedure  preparation of smear  genital source
Screening for chromosomal aneuploidy in prenatal amniotic fluid
Vaccination for diphtheria  pertussis  and tetanus
